definition: The Treasury basis trade ($800B-$1T at 50-100x leverage) is the primary channel by which duration risk in self-funded AI investment could convert to crash risk. Interacts with international flow reversal ($300-500B) in a multiplicative, not additive, fashion under joint activation scenarios.
evidence: Basis trade size of $800B-$1T at 50-100x leverage
pair_0 debate concluded neither channel dominates; the combination is worse than either alone
open_questions: Whether SEC central clearing mandate (Q2 2026) changes basis trade dynamics
Probability of joint activation of basis trade stress and international flow reversal
Whether Fed crisis tools can address Treasury market dislocation fast enough
